headline: ‘Market Resilience to Continue in 2H26’: Raymond James Picks 2 ‘Strong Buy’ Stocks to Consider
summary: The first six months of 2026 gave investors almost everything they could ask for, except a quiet market. Stocks weathered a Middle East war that sent energy prices climbing, a resurgence in inflation that kept interest-rate expectations in flux, and recurring questions about whether the multibillion-dollar wave of AI spending could keep delivering attractive returns. Those concerns triggered several pullbacks during the first half, yet investors repeatedly stepped in as corporate earnings held u

headline: Raymond James bullish on Birkenstock, sees growth story at attractive valuation
summary: Investing.com -- Raymond James initiated coverage of Birkenstock Holding with an Outperform rating and a $52 price target in a note on Wednesday, arguing that the brand represents a compelling growth opportunity trading at an attractive valuation.
